beer_model.interpretation: Negative equity risk premium — bonds are relatively more attractive than equities on this simple model

summary: Nifty 50 extended its winning streak to a third consecutive session (+0.39% to 24,271) on July 3 as softer US jobs data boosted risk appetite; India VIX fell to 11.80, signalling calm; the rupee firmed to 95.22; however, the equity risk premium remains in negative territory (-1.94%) and mid/smallcap valuations look stretched (PE 29.3 / 36.1) — US markets were closed July 3 for Independence Day.
